field_requirement: at least 512 distinct domain points and j+1 distinct finite slopes

witnesses.construction: Choose a core C0 of size A-1 and j+1 outside points x_i. On C0 set f=g=0. At x_i set g(x_i)=1 and f(x_i)=-z_i for distinct slopes z_i. Then f+z_i g agrees with the zero codeword on C0 union {x_i}.
witnesses.noncontainment_check: On each exact support, g has A-1 >= k zeros and one nonzero value, so g restricted to the support is not a degree-<k RS word.
